en.text: prolongation from ῥώομαι (to dart; probably akin to G4506); to strengthen, i.e. (impersonal passive) have health (as a parting exclamation, good-bye)

senses.gloss_en: prolongation from ῥώομαι (to dart; probably akin to G4506); to strengthen, i.e. (impersonal passive) have health (as a parting exclamation, good-bye)
